top_signals.title: IFM Investors Passes 50% Stake in Deal Target Atlas Arteria
top_signals.summary: IFM Investors has passed the 50% threshold in its holdings of Australia-listed toll road operator Atlas Arteria Ltd. and extended its takeover bid.

top_signals.title: Easyjet investors call for £600m more from US bidder
top_signals.summary: Easyjet investors have said they are holding out for at least £600m more from Castlelake, the US private equity firm whose bids have been brushed off by the budget airline. Shareholders in the FTSE 250 firm said that they would not consider a takeover offer unless the offer reached at least £7 per share, valuing [...]
